# /test-plan

> Produce the feature's `test-plan/` folder with an index + one suite per FR group. Inline self-check against [templates/checklists/test-plan-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/test-plan-review.checklist.md).

## Usage

```
/test-plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/spec.md` (gate `SPEC_APPROVED` must be APPROVED)
- [templates/test-plan/index.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/index.template.md)
- [templates/test-plan/suite.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/suite.template.md)
- `project.config.yaml unitTestPolicy.*` for which artefact types require tests
- [constitution/07-testing.md](../../constitution/07-testing.md) (CE testing standards: FakeXrmEasy, PCF test harness, Power Fx tests)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert `SPEC_APPROVED` is APPROVED.
2. Group spec FRs into test suites by sub-platform area (model-driven / canvas / pages / pcf / power-automate) so suites map to one constitution sub-domain.
3. Render `test-plan/index.template.md` with:
   - One row per suite, schedule order, owners
   - Trace matrix linking FR → suite → expected coverage
4. For each suite, render `test-plan/{suite-slug}.suite.md` with:
   - Pre-conditions, test data, environment
   - Numbered test cases TC-NN with steps, expected results
   - Unit-test policy reference per `project.config.yaml unitTestPolicy` (plugin / js / pcf / canvas / portal)
5. **Inline self-check** against [test-plan-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/test-plan-review.checklist.md); BLOCKERs fail write.
6. Run `doc_lint` on each emitted markdown file.
7. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `TEST_PLAN_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/test-plan/index.md`
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/test-plan/{suite}.suite.md` (one per suite)
